entry.title: BILL070(25) (Honolulu): MAYOR → PUBLISH
entry.content:
RELATING TO PARKS AND PLAYGROUNDS.

Allows certain lands that are provided in perpetuity or dedicated for use as dog parks to be credited toward satisfying the requirements for the provision or dedication of lands for park and playground purposes under ROH Section 22-7.5. Limits the amount of dog park lands to be credited to up to 10 percent of the total park and playground lands required.

Status: MAYOR → PUBLISH

Latest action: Final reading notice published in the Honolulu Star-Advertiser.

View on the council site

entry.title: BILL070(25) (Honolulu): Deadline for Mayor to return Bill is 06/23/26. Transmitted to Mayor for his approval or otherwise.
entry.content:
RELATING TO PARKS AND PLAYGROUNDS.

Allows certain lands that are provided in perpetuity or dedicated for use as dog parks to be credited toward satisfying the requirements for the provision or dedication of lands for park and playground purposes under ROH Section 22-7.5. Limits the amount of dog park lands to be credited to up to 10 percent of the total park and playground lands required.

Latest action: Deadline for Mayor to return Bill is 06/23/26. Transmitted to Mayor for his approval or otherwise.

View on the council site
